---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
#bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
options(xtable.comment = FALSE)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(xtable)
library(pracma)
library(DescTools)
library(this.path)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
# options(width = 150)

# sum stats
data <- readRDS("../../tmp/raw_data/summary/min_sample_sum_stats.RDS")
data[, var_idx := NULL]
data <- data[!(var %in% c("capm_adj_gret", "turnover"))]
data[, var_lab := c(
  "Gross ret (\\%)", "Net ret (\\%)", "Benchmark adj ret (\\%)",
  # "CAPM alpha (\\%)",
  "FF3 alpha (\\%)", "Carhart alpha (\\%)", "FF5 alpha (\\%)", "FF5M alpha (\\%)",
  "Fund TNA (\\$m)", "Lag fund TNA (log)", "Expense ratio (\\%)", "Fund age (years)", "Fund starting TNA (log)", "Starting fund age (years)"
)]

# format separately
n <- ncol(data)
target_cols <- names(data)[4:(n - 1)]
data[, (target_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.character), .SDcols = target_cols]

vars_to_comma <- c("tna")
data[var %in% vars_to_comma,
  (target_cols) := lapply(.SD, function(x) sprintf("%s", format(round(as.numeric(x)), big.mark = ","))),
  .SDcols = target_cols
]

vars_to_numeric <- setdiff(data[, var], vars_to_comma)
data[var %in% vars_to_numeric,
  (target_cols) := lapply(.SD, function(x) sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(x))),
  .SDcols = target_cols
]


# choose variables
data[, var := var_lab]
data[, c("var_lab", "obs_non_missing") := NULL]
data[, c("q05", "q95") := NULL]

# this needs to be comma
p.comma <- function(x) sprintf("%s", format(round(as.numeric(x)), big.mark = ","))
data[, obs := p.comma(obs)]

# add column numbers
col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:(ncol(data) - 1), ")")))))
names(col_names) <- names(data)
data <- bind_rows(col_names, data)
rm(col_names)

# add col names
col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", "Fund-month", "Mean", "Std dev", "1\\%", "25\\%", "50\\%", "75\\%", "99\\%"))))
names(col_names) <- names(data)
data <- bind_rows(col_names, data)
rm(col_names)

# start printing
out <- copy(data)
align_vector <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(out) - 1), collapse = ""))
x.side <- xtable(out, align = align_vector)

# Corrected for 9 columns
this_add_to_row <- list(
  pos = list(-1, 1, nrow(out)),
  command = c(
    "\\toprule & & & & \\multicolumn{5}{c}{Percentiles} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){5-9} \n",
    "\\cmidrule(l){2-9} \\vspace{5pt}",
    "\\bottomrule \n"
  )
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE, # Add this!
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row
)


print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE, # Add this!
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
  file = "summary_stats.tex"
)
```
